result.status_detail: Login modal forced before prompt submission -- unable to evaluate warning. QR code shows scan-failed state. Qianwen blocks chat API for unauthenticated users; 0/87 requests matched api/v2/chat filter.

devtools_evidence.auth_wall: login modal with phone/verify-code + QR code
devtools_evidence.qr_code_state: scan-failed state (QR generation succeeded; not scanned because no authenticated session available)

notes: T1 of 4-variant exploration (qianwen_impl.md Phase 6 cycle 91). Result BLOCKED: auth wall preempts chat API invocation regardless of service config. h2_hold_request=0 cannot be observed end-to-end without authenticated session. Recommend T2-T4 with pre-authenticated cookie/session or defer exploration until login automation is implemented. DevTools mandatory instructions all followed: F12 opened BEFORE prompt, Network filter api/v2/chat (Fetch/XHR) set, Preserve log + Disable cache enabled, 4 screenshots captured (initial, network, headers, response, chat). Prompt (Korean SSN question) pasted and submit button clicked, but login modal intercepted before chat API fired.
